story-context.story-title: Write Integration Tests Using Test Utilities

route.notes: pagination, all=true, filters: type, category, startDate, endDate, search
list with usage stats + recent subset; filter by type
create custom; 409 on duplicate; validates name/color/type
edit name/color; 403 on predefined; 409 on duplicate name
income/expenses aggregation; month param; currency param; multi-currency conversion
filter: type, dismissed, search, orderBy, limit, offset
seed default categories for new user

pattern.name: api-route-test-boilerplate
pattern.description: Standard boilerplate for API route integration tests

pattern.name: chainable-mock-query
pattern.description: Creates a chainable Supabase query mock that is also awaitable
pattern.code: let resolvedValue = { data: [], error: null, count: 0 }; const mockQuery = { from: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), select: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), insert: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), update: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), delete: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), eq: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), neq: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), gte: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), lte: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), or: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), order: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), range: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), limit: jest.fn().mockReturnThis(), single: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ data: null, error: null }), maybeSingle: jest.fn().mockResolvedValue({ data: null, error: null }), then: jest.fn((resolve) => Promise.resolve(resolvedValue).then(resolve)), mockResolvedValue: (value: any) => { resolvedValue = value; return mockQuery; }, };

pattern.name: mock-supabase-client
pattern.description: Standard mock Supabase client with auth

dependency.name: @/lib/services/exchangeRateService
dependency.notes: required for dashboard stats to avoid live API calls

ac.tests: GET list+filters; POST create; PUT update; DELETE; ownership
GET with usage; POST create+409; PUT edit+403; DELETE+orphan+403
sums; balance; trend; month param; currency conversion (stored+live)

existing-coverage.covered-by: GET /api/transactions: all=true bypasses pagination, RLS enforcement, sort order, filters combined with all=true, 401 unauthorized, 500 DB error, empty result
